prompt: My sorghum just doesn't look right this season.
There's a white powdery dust all over the leaves of my pumpkin plants.
My layer hens' eggshells have gone thin and crack very easily lately.
How much Actellic dust should I mix per bag of maize for storage?
My cattle are covered in ticks. What should I dip them with?
Should I store my beans after harvest or sell them straight away?
Parts of my onion field are stunted and the bulbs are staying small.
My day-old chicks are huddling tightly together under the lamp and cheeping loudly.
My pepper plants suddenly wilt in the afternoon and don't fully recover by morning.
How can I tell from the soil and the weather when it's the right time to plant my beans?
